p512_n1536_server_baseline.description: OpenAI serving benchmark for the accepted quality-valid p512/n1536 recipe, used to split TTFT from steady decode.
p512_n1536_server_baseline.decision: Valid latency split for the accepted recipe. TTFT is modest for a single p512 request; steady decode remains the main limiter.

p512_n1536_server_topology_override.description: Same serving benchmark with CCL_TOPO_FABRIC_VERTEX_CONNECTION_CHECK=0 after that flag was slightly faster in direct throughput repeats.
p512_n1536_server_topology_override.decision: Rejected as a serving/decode improvement. ITL is effectively unchanged and TTFT/output throughput are worse than the default-topology serving control.

p4096_n512_prefill_server_mbt1024.description: Long-prefill serving probe at max_model_len=8192 and MBT=1024 using the clean-weight recipe.
p4096_n512_prefill_server_mbt1024.decision: Invalid as a quality result. The random long-prefill serving output was all NUL characters.

p4096_n512_direct_throughput_mbt1024.description: Direct vllm bench throughput repeat with the same p4096/n512 cache to separate server streaming overhead from model/runtime behavior.
p4096_n512_direct_throughput_mbt1024.decision: Not promotable because the same cache/config failed the long-context quality canary. Useful only as a timing/control artifact.

p4096_long_context_quality_mbt1024.description: Long-context quality canary for the same max_model_len=8192, MBT=1024 cache/config.
p4096_long_context_quality_mbt1024.decision: Reject max_model_len=8192/MBT1024 for this clean-weight piecewise path until long-context graph corruption is fixed.

localmaxxing.reason: No new quality-valid improvement. The p512 serving control is a diagnostic latency split, the topology override is a serving regression, and the p4096/8192-context probe failed quality.

next_targets: Keep max_model_len=2048/MBT512 as the accepted quality-valid MiniMax headline path.
Treat long-context/prefill as blocked by graph corruption at max_model_len=8192 before optimizing speed.
Investigate the p4096/8192 NUL failure with finite tracing around prefill and the first decode token.
Return decode-speed work to source-level allreduce/residual/RMS/MoE boundary fusion, because p512 TTFT is not the main limiter.
